zh.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: 荷蘭努-布拉班特奧易爾特
zh.Virneburg, Adenau, Rhein, Germany: 海因里希_海普洛文次阿德瑙利爾斯塔爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lisa von Virneburg於大約1260年出生在荷蘭霍蘭時，她的父親Heinrich von Virneburg44歲，母親Ponchetta von Oberstein27歲。她於1286年3月18日與Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1299年之後。

zh-hans.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: 荷兰努-布拉班特奧易爾特
zh-hans.Virneburg, Adenau, Rhein, Germany: 海因里希_海普洛文次阿德瑙利爾斯塔爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lisa von Virneburg于大约1260年出生在荷兰霍蘭时，她的父亲Heinrich von Virneburg44岁，母亲Ponchetta von Oberstein27岁。她于1286年3月18日与Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1299年之后。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Lisa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Liza , influenced by French Lise and German Liese.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lisa von Virneburg was born about 1260, in Holland, Netherlands, her father, Heinrich von Virneburg, was 44 and her mother, Ponchetta von Oberstein, was 27. She married Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve on 18 March 1286. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1299.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lisa von Virneburg est née environ 1260, à Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Heinrich von Virneburg, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Ponchetta von Oberstein, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve le 18 mars 1286. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1299.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lisa von Virneburg um 1260 in Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich von Virneburg 44 und ihre Mutter Ponchetta von Oberstein 27. Sie hat am 18. März 1286 Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1299.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lisa von Virneburg è nata il circa 1260 nel Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Heinrich von Virneburg, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Ponchetta von Oberstein, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve il 18 marzo 1286. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1299.

ja.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: オランダノオルド-ブラバントオイルスチオト
ja.Virneburg, Adenau, Rhein, Germany: プレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズアデナウリールスタル
ja.lifeSummary: Lisa von Virneburgが約1260年にオランダホーランドで生まれた時，父Heinrich von Virneburgは44歳，母Ponchetta von Obersteinは27歳であった。1286年3月18日にDietrich Luf II. von Kleveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1299年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lisa von Virneburg(이)가 대략 1260년 네덜란드 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich von Virneburg(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ponchetta von Oberstein(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1286년 3월 18일 Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1299년 이후 사망했다.

pt.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Oirschot, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lisa von Virneburg nasceu aproximadamente 1260, em Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Heinrich von Virneburg, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Ponchetta von Oberstein, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve em 18 de março de 1286. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1299.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lisa von Virneburg родилась около 1260 г. в местности холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Heinrich von Virneburg было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Ponchetta von Oberstein, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve 18 марта 1286 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1299 г.

sm.about 1260–nach 1299: e tusa o le 1260–ina ua ma'ea le 1299

es.Oirschot, Noord-Brabant, Nederland: Oirschot, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lisa von Virneburg nació aproximadamente 1260, en Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Heinrich von Virneburg, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Ponchetta von Oberstein, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Dietrich Luf II. von Kleve el 18 de marzo de 1286. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1299.
